rejectedObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill mandates TDD red-phase ('Write tests FIRST' then run failing tests), but this worker session ran baseline passing tests and performed implementation edits before adding the new ordering tests.

Feature expected behavior references `node -e require('@cash/orderbook-sdk')`, but practical verification in this repo used path-based checks (`require('./dist')` and requiring sdk by absolute package directory). The local validation convention for package-name runtime checks is still unclear in shared guidance.
